creator: gedas@tdd.lt
text:
Cirrus Logic, maker of CD1400 chip, introduced new version of their
chip. Cyclades multiport cards were redesigned in order to use this
new chip. Current cy.c driver (1.41.2.3) do not work with new cards.

How-To-Repeat: Install new Cyclades multi port card and try to use it with current
cy.c driver
